zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathan Fiske於1615年出生在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Nathaniel Fiske22歲，母親Dorothy Symonds21歲。他於1640年與Susannah Browne在英國素福爾可阿爾德林加姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年6月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathan Fiske于1615年出生在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Nathaniel Fiske22岁，母亲Dorothy Symonds21岁。他于1640年与Susannah Browne在英国素福爾可阿爾德林加姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年6月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Nathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Nathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathan Fiske was born in 1615, in South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England, his father, Nathaniel Fiske, was 22 and his mother, Dorothy Symonds, was 21. He married Susannah Browne in 1640, in St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 June 1676, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathan Fiske è nato il nel 1615 nel South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Nathaniel Fiske, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Symonds, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Susannah Browne nel 1640, nel St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Nathan Fiskeが1615年にイギリススフォルクソウス エルムハム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Fiskeは22歳，母Dorothy Symondsは21歳であった。1640年にイギリススフォルクアルドリンガムスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチでSusannah Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年6月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードファルミントンプレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Nathan Fiske(이)가 1615년 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Fiske(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Symonds(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1640년 영국 수폴크 올드링함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에서 Susannah Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 6월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 패밍턴 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathan Fiske nasceu em 1615, em South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathaniel Fiske, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Symonds, tinha 21 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathan Fiske родился в 1615 г. в местности соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Fiske было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Symonds, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah Browne в 1640 г. в местности ст андрю'с чурч, алдрингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июня 1676 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности плеис, фармингтон, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathan Fiske nació en 1615, en South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Nathaniel Fiske, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Dorothy Symonds, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Susannah Browne en 1640, en St Andrew's Church, Aldringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de junio de 1676, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
